caption: A screen recording captures a video call session where a person is presenting a complex digital mind map. The mind map features various colorful circular icons connected by blue lines on a black background, with labels such as "Knowledge" and "Insights" appearing near the nodes. At the top of the screen, several browser tabs are open, including one titled "Truth & Learning by Systemantics" and another titled "Future of Society by Systemantics." In the upper right corner, a small video feed shows a man wearing a dark baseball cap and a blue shirt, who remains relatively still across the sequence. The screen content remains mostly static, with only minor movements in the presenter's video feed and slight shifts in the cursor's position, indicating a moment of explanation or a pause in the presentation of the conceptual diagram.
